title: rubus fabryi
intro: Rubus fabryi, also known as the Fabry's raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Himalayas and parts of India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus fabryi include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus fabryi can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
